title: 10 best herbal creams for dandruff
description: Azadirachta indica, also known as neem, creams helps with dandruff because of its antifungal and antibacterial properties. Neem oil, a key component in the cream, has the ability to control the growth of yeast on the scalp, a primary cause of dandruff. The anti-inflammatory properties of neem also soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and flaking. Additionally, neem's ability to regulate the pH balance of the scalp helps to maintain a healthy environment, preventing dandruff a...
